title: Frogcrafting's Hardcore Modpack
description:
The modpack used in Frogcrafting's Hardcore stream world!  
Featuring vanilla+ additions, cozy aesthetics, and of course some light Create mod.
body:
<center>

![Frogcrafting Hardcore Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/51e0kYxF/images/72184335b6c8cd86a4e2be18781bec84d535317f.png)

</center>

## Frogcrafting's Hardcore Modpack 
Want to join in on the fun of Frogcrafting's weekly modded [Twitch Streams](https://www.twitch.tv/frogcrafting)?  
This is the modpack for you! 
This modpack features the exact configuration of mods, data packs, and resource packs used by [Frogcrafting](https://www.youtube.com/@frogcrafting).  

This is a vanilla+ modpack featuring mostly aesthetic changes and Frog's [Custom Resource Packs](https://modrinth.com/collection/2EEVG5tr), but rest assured there are plenty of mods included to help you manage your storage problems, and QoL features from [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)!  

Live out your cottage core dreams using the Let's Do series of mods, get just a tad industrial thanks to Create, or decorate with Another Furniture Mod, this pack gives you plenty of options while staying lightweight.  

This project even includes the exact shaders and settings used by Frog on stream and is fully compatible with her existing [World Downloads](https://frogcrafting.carrd.co/#downloads), or you could copy her world's seed when creating a new world of your own and take your adventure in its own direction! 

Something missing?  
While you may find [Easy Mob Farm](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-mob-farm) on Frog's twitch, this has not been included as it felt out of place with the rest of the pack, though, you are welcome to add it in yourself!
